source: Mendoza College of Business at Notre Dame

news.title: Handpumps bring water to rural African communities, but many are broken – study models how best to maintain them
news.summary_en: A team of operations management researchers look at how nongovernmental organisations (NGOs) manage and maintain rural water systems.

news.title: New Executive in Residence program bridges classroom and boardroom
news.summary_en: Notre Dame MBA Executives in Residence bring extensive leadership experience to mentor MBA students, partner with faculty and expand professional networks beyond campus.
